chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 196 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Saif-ur-Rehman Naich, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI/PS
